groups.name: Modern American Canasta
groups.notes: Scraped Mar 9 10:30 PM - 4 new entries. FB061 (Adele Schubert Reinstein, red 3 as last stock card ends game immediately, 3 comments majority). FB062 (Leslie Carol Berg Weiss, cannot pick pack to open with dirty aces - must be clean, 10 comments unanimous, page 37 confirmed). FB063 (Lynda Garber, Splash = clean canasta opening worth 500 not 3500, not a special hand, 6 comments unanimous). FB064 (Merri Geri, cannot discard joker strategically to avoid points unless only wilds remain, 5 comments unanimous). Skipped: Debbie Dobin Perkiss (LFG post), Kathy Fortier (LFG/teacher search), Andrew Freedman (Real Canasta app feedback).
